finding: No single browser-visible signal proves audibility. Render-position advance, playback counters, route availability, and physical observation are independent evidence channels whose agreement or contradiction should drive the next diagnostic action.
design_implication: Fuse channels without averaging them into a false confidence score. A physical audible observation is direct audibility evidence; browser progress plus physical inaudibility is a contradiction that shifts investigation downstream from graph scheduling; route loss plus inaudibility is convergent route evidence.

covered: stalled browser path without gesture control

uncertainty: No physical iPhone observation was produced in this run.
No deployed application integration was exercised.
Editor drafts may change and implementation support varies.
privacy_boundary: The evaluator retains categorical route state only and never retains output device identifiers or labels.
claim_boundary: The evaluator classifies evidence relationships; it does not prove a browser bug, operating-system fault, hardware fault, or human audibility unless physical is explicitly observed as audible.
falsification_route: Integrate all four channels into one exact deployed probe, then show a case where the evaluator's prescribed next action is contradicted by independently captured device-level evidence.
